vbox.p: J. Nodeman is a software engineer and technical writer with an unhealthy obsession with declarative UI systems. After spending several years fighting CSS specificity wars and webpack configuration files, he decided there had to be a better way.
He found it, improbably, inside a game engine.

Nodeman is the primary author of the xml_to_godot rendering pipeline and writes about it whenever he can convince himself that anyone else cares. He lives somewhere with good coffee and a reliable internet connection, which is all any of us really need.
All articles are written in plain XML and rendered at runtime — including this one. The author considers this either a proof of concept or a cry for help, depending on the day.
Reach the author through the project repository. Pull requests are welcome. Unsolicited CSS framework recommendations are not.
